text:
# High Court Judgment Template

In the Family Court		Case No: [Case number]

sitting at [Court name]

The Debtors Act 1869

The [Marriage] / [Civil Partnership] / [Relationship] of [applicant name] and [respondent name]

(Adapt as necessary)

[After hearing [name the advocates(s) who appeared]]

After consideration of the documents lodged by the parties

DIRECTIONS ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR COMMITTAL MADE BY [NAME OF JUDGE] ON [DATE] SITTING IN OPEN COURT

TO [RESPONDENT NAME] OF [RESPONDENT ADDRESS]

THIS IS AN IMPORTANT LEGAL DOCUMENT REQUIRING YOU TO ATTEND COURT. YOU SHOULD READ IT CAREFULLY AND YOU ARE ADVISED TO OBTAIN INDEPENDENT LEGAL ADVICE.

WARNING: IF YOU DO NOT ATTEND THE COURT ON THE DATE AND AT THE TIME STATED BELOW, A WARRANT MAY BE ISSUED FOR YOUR ARREST AND PRODUCTION AT COURT.

TAKE NOTICE THAT: IF THE JUDGE IS SATISFIED THAT:

* THE AMOUNT ORDERED TO BE PAID HAS NOT BEEN PAID;

* YOU HAVE (OR SINCE THE DATE OF THE ORDER HAVE HAD) THE MEANS TO PAY IT; AND

* YOU ARE REFUSING OR NEGLECTING (OR HAVE REFUSED OR NEGLECTED) TO PAY IT

THE JUDGE MAY ORDER YOUR COMMITTAL TO PRISON

The parties

The applicant is [applicant name]

The respondent is [respondent name]

[The second respondent is [respondent name]]

[The third [etc] respondent is [respondent name]]

[The intervener is [intervener name]]

(Specify if any party acts by a litigation friend)

Recitals

This is a directions order made on the applicant’s application for committal of the respondent to prison made pursuant to the Debtors Act 1869, section 5.
